name: Tavus
description: Tavus AI video — generate lifelike talking-head videos from a trained replica + script (or audio), train Phoenix replicas from a short video or headshot, manage personas, and run real-time Conversational Video Interface (CVI) sessions.

tools.name: create_video
tools.description: Generate a talking-head video from a replica + script (or audio_url). Async — returns {video_id, status:'queued', hosted_url}. Poll get_video or pass a callback_url. status flows queued → generating → ready.

replica_id.description: Replica to speak the video. From list_replicas.

script.description: Text the replica speaks. Provide this OR audio_url.

audio_url.description: Direct URL to an audio file the replica lip-syncs to. Alternative to script.

video_name.description: Display name for the generated video.

background_url.description: A website URL to record + use as the background.

background_source_url.description: Direct link to a background video file (e.g. S3).

callback_url.description: Webhook called when the video completes/fails.

transparent_background.description: Produce a .webm with transparency. Requires fast:true.

watermark_image_url.description: Image URL to overlay as a watermark.

properties.description: Background scroll + intro options: background_scroll, background_scroll_type, background_scroll_depth, background_scroll_return, start_with_wave.

tools.name: get_video
tools.description: Fetch a video's status + URLs. status: queued|generating|ready|deleted|error.

tools.name: list_videos
tools.description: List generated videos. Args: limit?, page?.

tools.name: create_replica
tools.description: Train a Phoenix replica from a short training video (train_video_url) or a headshot (train_image_url + voice_name). Async — returns {replica_id, status:'started'}. Poll get_replica until status=completed.

train_video_url.description: Presigned S3 or publicly fetchable training video. Provide this OR train_image_url.

train_image_url.description: Public headshot image URL. Requires voice_name. Alternative to train_video_url.

voice_name.description: Voice slug (case-insensitive, e.g. 'anna'). Required when using train_image_url.

consent_video_url.description: Separate video containing the consent statement.

auto_fix_training_image.description: Auto-correct the training image to meet requirements.

model_name.description: Replica model. Default phoenix-4; phoenix-3 for the older model.

tools.name: get_replica
tools.description: Fetch a replica's training status + details. status: started|completed|error.

tools.name: list_replicas
tools.description: List replicas. Args: limit?, page?, replica_type? ('user'|'system'), verbose?.

tools.name: create_persona
tools.description: Create a persona — defines the agent's behavior, tone, system prompt, and which layers (LLM, TTS, perception) the CVI uses. Returns {persona_id}.

context.description: Background knowledge the persona should have.

default_replica_id.description: Replica this persona uses by default in conversations.

layers.description: CVI layer config (llm, tts, perception, stt). See Tavus docs for shape.

tools.name: create_conversation
tools.description: Start a real-time Conversational Video Interface (CVI) session with a replica + persona. Returns {conversation_id, conversation_url (Daily room), status}. Open conversation_url to join the live video call.

persona_id.description: Persona driving behavior. If it lacks a replica, replica_id is required.

conversational_context.description: Extra context injected for this specific conversation.

properties.description: Session options: max_call_duration, participant_left_timeout, enable_recording, enable_transcription, language, etc.

tools.name: list_conversations
tools.description: List conversations. Args: limit?, page?, status?.

tools.name: end_conversation
tools.description: End an active conversation (hangs up the live call).
